headline: Maxence Lacroix
body: 🚨🔵 Chelsea remain in active talks for new centre back as Maxence Lacroix is priority target. Negotiations ongoing with all parties, Palace and player’s camp - Lacroix is keen on CFC move. Deal on.
raw_text:
🚨🔵 Chelsea remain in active talks for new centre back as Maxence Lacroix is priority target.

Negotiations ongoing with all parties, Palace and player’s camp - Lacroix is keen on #CFC move.

Deal on.
